info.title: Affirm API
info.description: Affirm's API for managing transactions, checkouts, cards, disputes, and files for the buy now pay later platform.

get.description: Retrieve the virtual card details associated with a checkout.

post.description: Cancel a virtual card associated with a checkout.
Finalize a virtual card associated with a checkout.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific checkout session.

post.description: Create a new checkout session for in-store purchases.
Create a new direct checkout session.
Update an existing checkout session with new details such as shipping information.
Resend a checkout notification to the customer.

checkout_id.description: The unique identifier of the checkout to resend.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of transactions.

parameters.name: transaction_type
parameters.description: The type of transaction to list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Expand related resources in the response.

parameters.name: Has-Strict-Validation
parameters.description: Enable strict validation on the request.

post.description: Authorize a new transaction using a checkout token.

get.description: Retrieve a list of transaction events filtered by type.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: before_ari
parameters.description: Cursor for backward pagination by ARI.

parameters.name: after_ari
parameters.description: Cursor for forward pagination by ARI.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific transaction.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Expand related resources in the response.

parameters.name: Has-Strict-Validation
parameters.description: Enable strict validation on the request.

post.description: Update a transaction with new order or shipping details.
Capture an authorized transaction, either fully or partially.
Refund a captured transaction, either fully or partially.
Void an authorized transaction that has not been captured.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of settlement events for reconciliation.

parameters.name: merchant_id
parameters.description: The merchant identifier to filter settlement events.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: from_cursor_uuid
parameters.description: UUID cursor for the start of the range.

parameters.name: from_cursor_date
parameters.description: Date cursor for the start of the range.

parameters.name: to_cursor_uuid
parameters.description: UUID cursor for the end of the range.

parameters.name: to_cursor_date
parameters.description: Date cursor for the end of the range.

get.description: Retrieve a list of disputes, optionally filtered by merchant or date.

parameters.name: opened_before
parameters.description: Filter disputes opened before this date.

parameters.name: opened_after
parameters.description: Filter disputes opened after this date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific dispute.

post.description: Close a dispute with a resolution.
Submit evidence for a dispute, such as file attachments.
Upload a file for use as dispute evidence or other purposes.

parameters.name: file_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the file.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication using public_api_key as username and private_api_key as password.

CheckoutIdPath.name: checkout_id
CheckoutIdPath.description: The unique identifier of the checkout.

TransactionIdPath.name: transaction_id
TransactionIdPath.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

DisputeIdPath.name: dispute_id
DisputeIdPath.description: The unique identifier of the dispute.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: A unique key to ensure idempotent requests. Providing the same key for duplicate requests prevents the operation from being performed more than once.

BadRequest.description: Bad Request. The request was malformed or contained invalid parameters.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

NotFound.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

Conflict.description: Conflict. The request could not be completed due to a conflict with the current state of the resource.

field.description: The field that caused the error, if applicable.

user_cancel_url.description: URL to redirect the user to upon cancellation.

user_confirmation_url.description: URL to redirect the user to upon confirmation.

use_vcn.description: Whether to use a virtual card number.

display_name.description: The display name of the item.

unit_price.description: The unit price of the item in cents.

item_url.description: URL of the item detail page.

discount_display_name.description: The display name of the discount.

created.description: Timestamp when the card was created.

billing_frequency.description: The billing frequency for the loan.

financial_program_name.description: The name of the financial program.

api_version.description: The API version used for this checkout.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the checkout.

checkout_status.description: The current status of the checkout.

billing.description: Billing contact information. Name, phone_number, email, and address are required.

items.description: List of items in the checkout.

discounts.description: List of discounts applied to the checkout.

redirect_url.description: The URL to redirect the customer to for checkout.

checkout_id.description: The unique identifier of the checkout.

shipping_confirmation.description: The shipping confirmation or tracking number.

created.description: Timestamp when the update was created.

shipping_confirmation.description: The shipping confirmation or tracking number.

type.description: The type of the update event.

id.description: The unique identifier of the update event.

status.description: The current status of the transaction.

created.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created.

items.description: List of items in the transaction.

events.description: List of events associated with the transaction.

next.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

previous.description: Cursor for the previous page of results.

type.description: The event type (e.g., capture, refund, void, update).

created.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

shipping_confirmation.description: The shipping confirmation or tracking number.

count.description: The total number of transaction events.

next.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

previous.description: Cursor for the previous page of results.

transaction_id.description: The checkout token used to authorize the transaction (9-16 characters).

items.description: List of items in the transaction.

shipping_confirmation.description: The shipping confirmation or tracking number.
The shipping confirmation or tracking number.

amount.description: The amount to capture in cents. Must be at least 1.
The amount to refund in cents. If omitted, the full captured amount is refunded.
The amount to void in cents.

created.description: Timestamp when the settlement event was created.

count.description: The total number of settlement events.

next.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

previous.description: Cursor for the previous page of results.

status.description: The current status of the dispute.

opened_at.description: Timestamp when the dispute was opened.

closed_at.description: Timestamp when the dispute was closed, if applicable.

resolution.description: The resolution outcome of the dispute.

timeline.description: Timeline of events for the dispute.

next.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

previous.description: Cursor for the previous page of results.

resolution.description: The resolution type for closing the dispute.

file_ids.description: List of file identifiers to attach as evidence.

notes.description: Additional notes to accompany the evidence.

status.description: The status of the evidence submission.

created.description: Timestamp when the evidence was submitted.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the file.

created.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.

download_url.description: The URL to download the file.

tags.name: Cards
tags.description: Manage virtual card numbers for Affirm checkouts.

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Create and manage Affirm checkout sessions.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Authorize, capture, refund, and void transactions.

tags.name: Disputes
tags.description: Manage and respond to transaction disputes.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Upload and download files for dispute evidence and other purposes.
